overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a space-suited character exploring a desolate, icy alien moon surface. A massive ringed gas giant dominates the dark starry sky as the character traverses rocky terrain scattered with boulders and ice patches, navigating between rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open icy plain with scattered rock clusters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the barren icy surface toward a cluster of dark rocks in the distance

entered.detail: massive gas giant with prominent rings dominating the upper right portion of the sky
cluster of dark gray rocks scattered across the icy plain ahead
large rocky outcrop visible on the horizon
snow-covered ground with patches of reflective ice

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking across a vast, open icy plain under a starry night sky. A massive ringed gas giant looms in the upper right, casting faint light on the snow-covered terrain scattered with dark boulders and rocky outcrops in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky passage with massive planetary rings overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full span of the ringed gas giant dominating the sky directly ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating between large boulders while approaching a tall rock spire, with the massive ringed planet becoming more prominent overhead

entered.detail: group of massive dark rocks flanking the path on the left side
prominent pointed rock formation rising against the sky

segments.scene_description: Moving through a rockier section of the terrain, the character passes between large boulders as the camera tilts upward to showcase the massive ringed planet now dominating the center of the sky. A tall rock spire becomes visible ahead against the backdrop of the glowing rings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between massive rock wall and open plain

events.description: character moves from open rocky terrain to a path running alongside a massive rock wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the base of a massive rock formation that now blocks the left side of the view

entered.detail: large vertical rock face running parallel to the path on the left side
smaller scattered rocks dotting the plain to the right

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to walking alongside a massive rock wall that now occupies the left side of the frame, creating a more enclosed feeling. The ringed gas giant shifts back toward the right side of the sky as the path continues along the rock face with scattered outcrops visible on the open plain to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate icy moon, transitioning from a vast open plain into a more enclosed rocky corridor. It begins with the character traversing a snow-covered expanse under a starry sky, where a massive ringed gas giant looms in the upper right. As the terrain becomes rockier, the camera tilts upward to center the glowing rings of the planet in the sky while the character passes between large boulders toward a distant rock spire. The scene then shifts as the character walks alongside a massive rock wall that closes in on the left side of the frame, pushing the gas giant back toward the right. Finally, the path continues along this imposing rock face, leaving the open plain and scattered outcrops to the side.
